function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1) { (forall(x2: T0) { x0(x1(x2)) = x2 } and forall(x3: T1) { x1(x0(x3)) = x3 } and lib(order).is_order_embedding[T0, T1](x1) and lib(order).is_order_embedding[T1, T0](x0)) = lib(order_iso).is_order_iso_pair[T0, T1](x1, x0) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1) { not (forall(x2: T0) { x0(x1(x2)) = x2 } and forall(x3: T1) { x1(x0(x3)) = x3 } and lib(order).is_order_embedding[T0, T1](x1) and lib(order).is_order_embedding[T1, T0](x0)) or lib(order_iso).is_order_iso_pair[T0, T1](x1, x0) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1) { not (forall(x2: T0) { x0(x1(x2)) = x2 } and forall(x3: T1) { x1(x0(x3)) = x3 } and lib(order).is_order_embedding[T0, T1](x1)) or not lib(order).is_order_embedding[T1, T0](x0) or lib(order_iso).is_order_iso_pair[T0, T1](x1, x0) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1) { not (forall(x2: T0) { x0(x1(x2)) = x2 } and forall(x3: T1) { x1(x0(x3)) = x3 }) or not lib(order).is_order_embedding[T0, T1](x1) or not lib(order).is_order_embedding[T1, T0](x0) or lib(order_iso).is_order_iso_pair[T0, T1](x1, x0) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1) { not forall(x2: T0) { x0(x1(x2)) = x2 } or not forall(x3: T1) { x1(x0(x3)) = x3 } or not lib(order).is_order_embedding[T0, T1](x1) or not lib(order).is_order_embedding[T1, T0](x0) or lib(order_iso).is_order_iso_pair[T0, T1](x1, x0) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1) { not forall(x2: T0) { x0(x1(x2)) = x2 } or not lib(order).is_order_embedding[T0, T1](x1) or not lib(order).is_order_embedding[T1, T0](x0) or exists(k0: T1) { x1(x0(k0)) != k0 } or lib(order_iso).is_order_iso_pair[T0, T1](x1, x0) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1) { not forall(x2: T0) { x0(x1(x2)) = x2 } or not lib(order).is_order_embedding[T0, T1](x1) or not lib(order).is_order_embedding[T1, T0](x0) or exists(k0: T1) { x1(x0(k0)) != k0 } or lib(order_iso).is_order_iso_pair[T1, T0](x0, x1) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T0) { not lib(order_iso).is_order_iso_pair[T0, T1](x0, x1) or (forall(x2: T0) { x1(x0(x2)) = x2 } and forall(x3: T1) { x0(x1(x3)) = x3 } and lib(order).is_order_embedding[T0, T1](x0) and lib(order).is_order_embedding[T1, T0](x1)) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T0) { not lib(order_iso).is_order_iso_pair[T0, T1](x0, x1) or (forall(x2: T0) { x1(x0(x2)) = x2 } and forall(x3: T1) { x0(x1(x3)) = x3 } and lib(order).is_order_embedding[T0, T1](x0)) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T0) { not lib(order_iso).is_order_iso_pair[T0, T1](x0, x1) or (forall(x2: T0) { x1(x0(x2)) = x2 } and forall(x3: T1) { x0(x1(x3)) = x3 }) } }
function[T0: lib(lattice).MeetSemilattice] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { lib(order_bounds).is_glb[T0](lib(order_bounds).is_in_pair[T0](x0, x1), x2) = (x0.meet(x1) = x2) } }
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0) { lib(order_bounds).is_lower_bound[T0](lib(order_bounds).is_in_pair[T0](x0, x0), x1) = x1 <= x0 } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: lib(equivalence).QuotientRelation[T0], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not forall(x4: T0, x5: T0) { not x0.rel(x4, x5) or x1(x5) = x1(x4) } or lib(equivalence).quotient_mk[T0](x0, x2) != lib(equivalence).quotient_mk[T0](x0, x3) or x1(x2) = x1(x3) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: lib(equivalence).QuotientRelation[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0 -> T1) { lib(equivalence).quotient_mk[T0](x0, x1) != lib(equivalence).quotient_mk[T0](x0, x2) or exists(k0: T0, k1: T0) { x0.rel(k0, k1) and x3(k1) != x3(k0) } or x3(x1) = x3(x2) } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: lib(equivalence).QuotientRelation[T0], x3: T0 -> T1) { x0 != x1 or exists(k0: T0, k1: T0) { x2.rel(k0, k1) and x3(k1) != x3(k0) } or x3(x0) = x3(x1) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1) { (lib(order).is_monotone[T0, T1](x0) and lib(functions).is_surjective_fn[T0, T1](x0)) = lib(order).is_order_surjection[T0, T1](x0) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1) { not (lib(order).is_monotone[T0, T1](x0) and lib(functions).is_surjective_fn[T0, T1](x0)) or lib(order).is_order_surjection[T0, T1](x0) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1) { not lib(order).is_order_surjection[T0, T1](x0) or (lib(order).is_monotone[T0, T1](x0) and lib(functions).is_surjective_fn[T0, T1](x0)) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0) { exists(k0: T0) { x0(x1, k0) } = lib(set).relation_support_fun[T0](x0, x1) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0) { not exists(k0: T0) { x0(x1, k0) } or lib(set).relation_support_fun[T0](x0, x1) } }

function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0) { (x0(x1, x2) or lib(relation_basic).relation_converse[T0, T0](x0, x1, x2)) = lib(relation_basic).relation_symmetric_closure[T0](x0, x1, x2) } }

function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0(x1, x2) and not lib(relation_basic).relation_converse[T0, T0](x0, x1, x2) or lib(relation_basic).relation_symmetric_closure[T0](x0, x1, x2) } }

function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not (not x0(x1, x2) and not lib(relation_basic).relation_converse[T0, T0](x0, x1, x2)) or not lib(relation_basic).relation_symmetric_closure[T0](x0, x1, x2) } }
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0) { lib(order_bounds).is_least[T0](lib(order_bounds).is_in_pair[T0](x0, x1), x1) = x1 <= x0 } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: List[T0], x1: T0 -> lib(set_base).Set[T1], x2: T0 -> lib(set_base).Set[T1]) { not forall(x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x1(x3) ⊂ x2(x3) } or lib(set).list_indexed_union[T1, T0](x0, x1) ⊂ lib(set).list_indexed_union[T1, T0](x0, x2) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: List[T0], x1: T0 -> lib(set_base).Set[T1], x2: T0 -> lib(set_base).Set[T1]) { exists(k0: T0) { k0 ∈ x0 and not x1(k0) ⊂ x2(k0) } or lib(set).list_indexed_union[T1, T0](x0, x1) ⊂ lib(set).list_indexed_union[T1, T0](x0, x2) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: lib(order_iso).OrderIso[T0, T1], x1: T1 -> Bool, x2: T1) { lib(order_iso).order_iso_preimage_predicate[T0, T1](x0, x1, x0.inv(x2)) = x1(x2) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: lib(order_iso).OrderIso[T1, T0]) { not x0(x1) or lib(order_iso).order_iso_preimage_predicate[T1, T0](x2, x0, x2.inv(x1)) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x1) or x2 = x1 } = lib(relation_basic).is_antisymmetric[T0](x0) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x1) or x2 = x1 } or lib(relation_basic).is_antisymmetric[T0](x0) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not lib(relation_basic).is_antisymmetric[T0](x0) or forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x1) or x2 = x1 } = true } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0) { not lib(relation_basic).is_antisymmetric[T0](x0) or forall(x2: T0) { not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x1) or x1 = x2 } = true } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not (x0(x1, x2) and x0(x2, x1) and x1 != x2) or not lib(relation_basic).is_antisymmetric[T0](x0) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T0, T0) -> T0, x2: (T1, T1) -> T1, x3: (T0, T0) -> T0) { not lib(relation_transport).preserves_binary_op[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) or x1 != x3 or lib(relation_transport).preserves_binary_op[T0, T1](x0, x3, x2) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: (T0, T1) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T1, x3: (T1, T2) -> Bool, x4: T2) { not x0(x1, x2) or not x3(x2, x4) or lib(relation_basic).relation_compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x3, x1, x4) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: (T1, T0) -> Bool, x1: T1, x2: (T0, T2) -> Bool, x3: T2) { exists(k0: T0) { x0(x1, k0) and x2(k0, x3) } = lib(relation_basic).relation_compose[T1, T0, T2](x0, x2, x1, x3) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: (T1, T0) -> Bool, x1: T1, x2: (T0, T2) -> Bool, x3: T2) { not exists(k0: T0) { x0(x1, k0) and x2(k0, x3) } or lib(relation_basic).relation_compose[T1, T0, T2](x0, x2, x1, x3) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: (T0, T1) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T1, x3: (T1, T2) -> Bool, x4: T2) { not (x0(x1, x2) and x3(x2, x4)) or lib(relation_basic).relation_compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x3, x1, x4) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1, x2: T1, x3: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { exists(k0: T0, k1: T0) { x0(k0) = x1 and x0(k1) = x2 and x3(k0, k1) } = lib(relation_transport).relation_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, x3, x1, x2) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1, x2: T1, x3: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not exists(k0: T0, k1: T0) { x0(k0) = x1 and x0(k1) = x2 and x3(k0, k1) } or lib(relation_transport).relation_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, x3, x1, x2) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0, x2: T1, x3: T1, x4: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not exists(k0: T0) { x0(x1) = x2 and x0(k0) = x3 and x4(x1, k0) } or lib(relation_transport).relation_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, x4, x2, x3) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T0, x3: T1, x4: T0, x5: (T1, T1) -> Bool) { not (x0(x1) = x2 and x0(x3) = x4 and x5(x1, x3)) or lib(relation_transport).relation_pushforward[T1, T0](x0, x5, x2, x4) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T0, x3: T1, x4: T0, x5: (T1, T1) -> Bool) { not (x0(x1) = x2 and x0(x3) = x4) or not x5(x1, x3) or lib(relation_transport).relation_pushforward[T1, T0](x0, x5, x2, x4) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T1 -> T0, x2: T1, x3: T0, x4: T1, x5: (T1, T1) -> Bool) { x0 != x1(x2) or x3 != x1(x4) or not x5(x2, x4) or lib(relation_transport).relation_pushforward[T1, T0](x1, x5, x0, x3) } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T1 -> T0, x2: T1, x3: (T1, T1) -> Bool, x4: T1) { x0 != x1(x2) or not x3(x2, x4) or lib(relation_transport).relation_pushforward[T1, T0](x1, x3, x0, x1(x4)) } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0 -> T1) { not x0(x1, x2) or lib(relation_transport).relation_pushforward[T0, T1](x3, x0, x3(x1), x3(x2)) } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T1 -> T0, x2: T1, x3: (T1, T1) -> Bool, x4: T1) { x0 != x1(x2) or not x3(x4, x2) or lib(relation_transport).relation_pushforward[T1, T0](x1, x3, x1(x4), x0) } }

function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: Nat, x2: Nat, x3: T0, x4: T0) { lib(relation_basic).relation_compose[T0, T0, T0](lib(relation).relation_power[T0](x0, x1), lib(relation).relation_power[T0](x0, x2)) != lib(relation).relation_power[T0](x0, x1 + x2) or lib(relation_basic).relation_compose[T0, T0, T0](lib(relation).relation_power[T0](x0, x1), lib(relation).relation_power[T0](x0, x2.suc), x3, x4) = lib(relation_basic).relation_compose[T0, T0, T0](lib(relation).relation_power[T0](x0, x1 + x2), x0, x3, x4) } }

function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: Nat, x2: Nat, x3: T0, x4: T0) { exists(k0: T0) { lib(relation).relation_power[T0](x0, x1 + x2, k0) != lib(relation_basic).relation_compose[T0, T0, T0](lib(relation).relation_power[T0](x0, x1), lib(relation).relation_power[T0](x0, x2), k0) } or lib(relation_basic).relation_compose[T0, T0, T0](lib(relation).relation_power[T0](x0, x1), lib(relation).relation_power[T0](x0, x2.suc), x3, x4) = lib(relation_basic).relation_compose[T0, T0, T0](lib(relation).relation_power[T0](x0, x1 + x2), x0, x3, x4) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> Bool, x2: T1 -> Bool) { not lib(functions).is_surjective_fn[T0, T1](x0) or lib(relation_transport).predicate_pullback[T0, T1](x0, x1) = lib(relation_transport).predicate_pullback[T0, T1](x0, x2) = (x1 = x2) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> Bool, x2: T1 -> Bool) { lib(relation_transport).predicate_pullback[T0, T1](x0, x1) != lib(relation_transport).predicate_pullback[T0, T1](x0, x2) or not lib(functions).is_surjective_fn[T0, T1](x0) or x1 = x2 } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> Bool, x2: T1 -> Bool) { not lib(functions).is_surjective_fn[T0, T1](x0) or x1 != x2 or lib(relation_transport).predicate_pullback[T0, T1](x0, x1) = lib(relation_transport).predicate_pullback[T0, T1](x0, x2) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: lib(set_base).Set[T0], x1: lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = x1 ⊃ x0 } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: lib(set_base).Set[T0], x1: lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { not forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } or x1 ⊃ x0 } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: lib(set_base).Set[T0], x1: lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { not x0 ⊃ x1 or forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x1 or x2 ∈ x0 } = true } }
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: lib(order_iso).OrderIso[T1, T0]) { not x0 < x1 or x2.inv(x0) < x2.inv(x1) } }

function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: (T0, T0) -> T0, x2: (T0, T0) -> T0) { not lib(relation_transport).respects_binary_op[T0](x0, x1) or x1 != x2 or lib(relation_transport).respects_binary_op[T0](x0, x2) } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> Bool, x2: T0) { lib(relation_transport).predicate_pullback[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x1(x0(x2)) } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T1 -> T0, x2: T1) { not x0(x1(x2)) or lib(relation_transport).predicate_pullback[T1, T0](x1, x0, x2) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> Bool, x2: T1 -> Bool) { not lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x0) or lib(relation_transport).predicate_pullback[T0, T1](x0, x1) = lib(relation_transport).predicate_pullback[T0, T1](x0, x2) = (x1 = x2) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> Bool, x2: T1 -> Bool) { lib(relation_transport).predicate_pullback[T0, T1](x0, x1) != lib(relation_transport).predicate_pullback[T0, T1](x0, x2) or not lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x0) or x1 = x2 } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> Bool, x2: T1 -> Bool) { not lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x0) or x1 != x2 or lib(relation_transport).predicate_pullback[T0, T1](x0, x1) = lib(relation_transport).predicate_pullback[T0, T1](x0, x2) } }
(forall(x0: Nat, x1: Pair[Nat, Nat]) { (x0.divides(x1.first) and x0.divides(x1.second)) = lib(nat).divides_both(x0, x1) })
(forall(x0: Nat, x1: Pair[Nat, Nat]) { not (x0.divides(x1.first) and x0.divides(x1.second)) or lib(nat).divides_both(x0, x1) })
(forall(x0: Nat, x1: Pair[Nat, Nat]) { not x0.divides(x1.second) or not x0.divides(x1.first) or lib(nat).divides_both(x0, x1) })
(forall(x0: Nat, x1: Pair[Nat, Nat]) { not lib(nat).divides_both(x0, x1) or (x0.divides(x1.first) and x0.divides(x1.second)) })
(forall(x0: Nat, x1: Pair[Nat, Nat]) { not lib(nat).divides_both(x0, x1) or x0.divides(x1.second) })
